title: Citi Opens New Route into Private Markets with Tokenized Share Offering
summary: Citi is using blockchain to offer tokenized digital depositary receipts representing equity in private companies, making it easier for investors to access these markets. This move could democratize private equity investments, which have traditionally been limited to wealthy individuals and institutions.
body:
Citi has introduced a new way for investors to access private company equity through tokenized digital depositary receipts. These tokenized shares represent ownership in private companies and are issued on a blockchain, making them easier to trade and transfer.

The bank is leveraging blockchain technology to create these digital assets, which are backed by actual equity in private firms. This innovation aims to provide a more accessible and transparent way for investors to participate in private markets, which have historically been closed off to all but the wealthiest individuals and large institutions.

For everyday investors, this development could mean more opportunities to diversify their portfolios with private company stocks. Tokenized shares could also reduce the complexity and costs associated with traditional private equity investments, making them more attractive to a broader audience.

Investors interested in this new offering should watch for announcements from Citi regarding the specific private companies included in the tokenized share program. As the technology matures, more banks and financial institutions may follow suit, expanding the range of tokenized investment products available.
twitterThread: Citi is tokenizing private company shares via digital depositary receipts, making them accessible to more investors. This could democratize private equity markets.
By using blockchain, Citi is issuing digital depositary receipts that represent ownership in private firms. These tokenized shares are easier to trade and transfer.

If you're an investor, keep an eye out for Citi's announcements on which private companies will be included. This could be a game-changer for portfolio diversification. Read more → https://cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-06-11-citi-launches-tokenized-shares-for-private-market-investments
standaloneTweet: Citi is opening a new route into private markets with tokenized digital depositary receipts, making private company equity more accessible to investors. This could democratize private equity and offer new investment opportunities.
